summary: CRITICAL: Workflow env section (line 19) hardcodes MANIFEST_PATH with default, overriding per-test-case values from .act.env set by test harness. Test cases expect different fixtures (all-approved: 3 deps, mixed: 4 deps, requirements: 3 deps) but workflow always runs mixed.package.json, causing tests to fail. Also: Bun install via curl | bash (line 24-25) is unsafe; should use actions/setup-bun. Code is otherwise well-structured (good DI, clear types, proper error handling) and scripts are readable, but workflow cannot execute the required test harness correctly.
